type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Profile Industries switched painting methods to powder coating, which does not use Xylene, the primary VOC release in previous years.

Profile Industries moved significantly toward using only powder-coating for all cabinet painting.  Xylene was only used for gel painting of interior parts and therefore the amount was significantly reduced

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Profile Industries switched painting methods to powder coating, which does not use Xylene, the primary VOC release in previous years.
Report used to be compiled by a consultant. An error in estimation was found during this reporting year which changed the amount recycled.
In depth review of releases performed since Profile Industries implemented ISO 14001 system.  It was found that emissions reported in past were on the low side.
